title: Tour of luxury cars makes pit stop in Mossel Bay
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"Video","html":"Video"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Several luxury sports cars made a pit stop in Mossel Bay today, 29 September.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Several luxury sports cars made a pit stop in Mossel Bay today, 29 September."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ferrari, Porsche and BMW cars were spotted rolling into the parking area of the Bartolomeu Dias Museum Complex.","html":"Ferrari, Porsche and BMW cars were spotted rolling into the parking area of the Bartolomeu Dias Museum Complex."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The cars and their drivers are part of a travelling car tour, the Unleashed Tour 2025, hosted by Sela Brokers, a Johannesburg-based insurance broker."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The tour began at the Fancourt Lifestyle Resort in George yesterday, 28 September, before stopping in Mossel Bay for lunch at Café Gannet.","html":"The tour began at the Fancourt Lifestyle Resort in George yesterday, 28 September, before stopping in Mossel Bay for lunch at Café Gannet."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Several Ferrari, Porsche and BMW cars were spotted rolling into Mossel Bay. Photo: Gabriélla Siebritz","html":"Several Ferrari, Porsche and BMW cars were spotted rolling into Mossel Bay. Photo: Gabriélla Siebritz"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"They plan on heading to Oubaai tomorrow, 30 September."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The tour is a first for the company and one it hopes to continue in the future.","html":"The tour is a first for the company and one it hopes to continue in the future."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Watch the video below. Video: Gabriélla Siebritz","html":"Watch the video below. Video: Gabriélla Siebritz"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your browser does not support HTML5 video.","html":"
"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
